title: 2022.5.04Fast builds, secure builds. Choose twoSummary:Stripe's continuous integration system is responsible for orchestrating build pipelines and executing tens of thousands of test suites. To meet our exceptionally high security bar, we lean on a combination of open-source tech and novel engineering.Author:Sushain CheriviralaTopics:Build SystemsDeveloper ProductivityInfrastructureEngineeringRead
